policy: Expanded snippets do not promote candidates. They only strengthen display and audit of rows already in authoritative_scope_rows.

records.acceptance_tier_en: A1 structured company-level absolute value; directly usable
records.acceptance_tier_zh: A1 公司级结构化绝对量，可直接使用
records.recognition_basis_en: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.recognition_basis_zh: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.snippet_en: Scope 3 emissions: Partner to decarbonise our value chains In 2024, our Scope 3 emissions were 574.6Mt CO2e (equity basis), approximately 19 times higher than our Scope 1 and 2 emissions. This is compared to a restated 2023 number of 572.5 Mt CO2e (equity basis). The majority of these emissions (94%) stem from customers processing our products, particularly iron ore (69%) and bauxite and alumina (23%). Specifically, emissions related to iron ore processing were 395.9Mt CO2e in 2024, compared to 399.9Mt CO2e in 2023. Emissions related to bauxite and alumina processing increased from 127.1Mt CO2e (restated) in 2023 to 134.0Mt CO2e in 2024, mostly as a result of increased bauxite sales. Many of our customers have set public targets for their Scope 1 and 2 emissions (our Scope 3). About 55%1 of our steel-producing customers by direct iron ore sales volume have set public targets to reach net zero or carbon neut

This is compared to a restated 2023 number of 572.5 Mt CO2e (equity basis). The majority of these emissions (94%) stem from customers processing our products, particularly iron ore (69%) and bauxite and alumina (23%). Specifically, emissions related to iron ore processing were 395.9Mt CO2e in 2024, compared to 399.9Mt CO2e in 2023. Emissions related to bauxite and alumina processing increased from 127.1Mt CO2e (restated) in 2023 to 134.0Mt CO2e in 2024, mostly as a result of increased bauxite sales. Many of our customers have set public targets for their Scope 1 and 2 emissions (our Scope 3). About 55%1 of our steel-producing customers by direct iron ore sales volume have set public targets to reach net zero or carbon neut
records.original_snippet_en: Page 60 explicitly reports total Scope 3 emissions at 574.6 Mt CO2e on an equity basis.
records.original_snippet_zh: 第 60 页明确披露权益口径 Scope 3 排放总量为 574.6 Mt CO2e。
